name: @limeflash/antigravity-plugin-cc
description: The Antigravity CLI (agy) plugin for Claude Code. Read-only commands with a real read-only guarantee plus secret/SSRF/path guards; a Node.js companion for background job control (/agy:rescue, /agy:status, /agy:result, /agy:cancel); Bash + PowerShell wrappers for the synchronous /agy:* commands.
